_seam_note: Content-graph IR: the panel pipeline WRITES this (wiki_to_comic.py projects it from the wiki graph on gate-pass); build_comic.py INLINES it into comic/index.html (no runtime fetch). image_path currently points at seeds/ as placeholder until panels are generated (then -> panels/SXX_panel_aNN.png).
_crop_note: crop is an OBJECT (review blocker #1): {shape, position:[x,y] object-position 0..1 focal point, zoom>=1}. shape drives container aspect at layout time; position+zoom frame the 16:9 source inside the (square/hero/wide) container WITHOUT re-generating other ratios — point position at the subjects so square cells never slice faces. Real generated panels are composed-to-shape so heavy zoom is rarely needed.

title.zh: ARIS — 我把那 24 小时交出去了
title.en: ARIS — I Handed Over Those 24 Hours

tagline.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

defaults._text_mode_options: html (HTML/CSS owns the whole bubble — design-locked default) | baked (text drawn into the image — RE-OPENED by user, pending the AI-baked-text duel once image_gen cools) | code (deterministic code-drawn bubble). per-panel override allowed via panels.<id>.text_mode.
defaults._locale_note: EN default for the international GitHub audience; zh first-class via toggle. text_fits gate must pass BOTH; size safe-zones to the longer (usually EN).

title.zh:
我把那 24 小时
交出去了

tag.zh: 离投稿，还有二十四小时。

narration.zh: 他把这一轮交给 ARIS，去睡了。蓝衣 executor、绿衣 reviewer 在笔记本里醒来。
narration.en: He hands the round to ARIS and goes to sleep. The blue executor and green reviewer wake inside the laptop.

beat_title.zh: 通胀审计 · 全片高潮

pages.skill: experiment-audit :: sanitizer ≠ validator → raw re-eval → WARN_corrected

narration.zh: schema-first 初看 +6.2。但 adversarial 审计发现评估器偷用了 JSON sanitizer 补键——纯 raw 重评后只剩 +1.4。效应真，范围缩小：诚实但不杀稿。
narration.en: schema-first looked like +6.2. But the adversarial audit found the evaluator secretly ran a JSON sanitizer — on a raw re-eval only +1.4 holds. Real but narrowed: honest, not killed.

tag.en: While you're away, the research carries on.

text.zh: 这一轮交给 ARIS 了。我睡几个小时，明早上课。
text.en: This round's on ARIS. I'll sleep a few hours — class in the morning.

S12._condition: per-panel content-driven gen config: the engine feeds content_svg (rendered to PNG) as -i ref #1 + duo_canonical as #2; bubbles are BAKED into the prompt (text_mode=baked)

condition.scene: warm-lit pixel ML research lab at night; a back board/monitor shows the method diagram (random-mask row ends red exact_parse FAIL, schema-keyword-first row ends green OK); a small wandb exact_parse curve with an amber +6.2 callout

chibi_action.executor: warm foreground LOWER-LEFT, one arm thrust up in triumph pointing at the board, proud
chibi_action.reviewer: foreground LOWER-RIGHT, arms crossed, eyes narrowed, already glancing toward the code, skeptical

caption.zh: 看起来，去噪顺序就是全部故事。
caption.en: The unmask order looked like the whole story.

condition.scene: dark, screen-lit; a laptop terminal shows the two-column code contrast — LEFT (red, THE BUG): score(json_sanitizer(out)) with '# default-fills malformed keys BEFORE scoring'; RIGHT (honest): json.loads + jsonschema.validate with '# raw, no repair'

chibi_action.reviewer: hunched at the terminal, finger jabbing the red sanitizer line
chibi_action.executor: leaning in over the shoulder, dawning-horror face, a single sweat drop

caption.zh: 评测器在判分前，先把错的修好了。
caption.en: The evaluator repaired the outputs before judging them.

condition.scene: a dark re-eval dashboard labeled HONEST RE-EVAL; the inflated +6.2 visibly cracks and falls into a solid green +1.4; the +4.8 drops away labeled 'evaluator self-repair artifact'

chibi_action.reviewer: flipping a RAW switch on the dashboard, composed
chibi_action.executor: watching the number collapse, humbled but not crushed

text.zh: 纯 raw 重评——真值是 +1.4。
text.en: Raw re-eval — the real number is +1.4.

caption.en: Real effect — but the scope narrowed.

condition.scene: a verdict card glows amber: WARN_corrected; the over-claim 'X is best' is struck through and narrows to '...best under an external validator'; a claim-ledger entry (integrity=WARN_corrected, scope)

chibi_action.reviewer: holding/stamping the WARN_corrected verdict, calm authority

text.en: Not killed — but write the scope.
